creator: handy@lambic.space.lockheed.com
text:
Xanim was upgraded in January on the master site.  The old one (circa
August) is still there, so this is low priority for sure...but I'm about
to try to do some fiddling with SGI image files and while I was here I 
grabbed the latest bits.  Pleasantly, I noticed that one of the patches
has been absorbed back into the master site. :-)
